title: Some Meal Rei Gets to Eat Sarcasm
display_title: Some Meal Rei Gets to Eat Sarcasm
wikitext:
[]: "Some Meal Rei Gets to Eat"- *Sarcasm*             Quote Post by KLVTZ » Thu Aug 05, 2010 2:15 am "Some Meal Rei Gets to Eat"- *Sarcasm* compared to Gendo's Vs. BTW i'm not stupid with regard to why she has to eat like that, its just looks funny when you compare the two lol. What do you think? And i guess you guyz could debate on what exactly those pills are. And i will include a Bonus Question- Is Gendo on a diet?

[]: Re: "Some Meal Rei Gets to Eat"- *Sarcasm*             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Aug 05, 2010 2:38 am KLVTZ wrote: BTW i'm not stupid with regard to why she has to eat like that, its just looks funny when you compare the two lol. What do you think? And i guess you guyz could debate on what exactly those pills are.

[]:             Quote Post by Taekmkm » Thu Aug 05, 2010 3:32 am There's a waiter in the room. I assume he's eating his meal in courses.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Aug 05, 2010 3:53 am Taekmkm wrote: I just assume that was Fuyutuski because... well, he has nothing else better to do.

[]:             Quote Post by Taekmkm » Thu Aug 05, 2010 3:56 am Like I said, nothing better to do.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Thu Aug 05, 2010 4:02 am Gendo on a Diet? XD Nah, the other half of that steak is probably already in his stomach. And I'm not sure wether that is his first glass of wine either. He's normally not that receptive for puppy stares. Then again, Anno & co did a great job on making that scene look as un-domestic as possible. Yes, they're having dinner together, but they're sitting at the ends of a laaaaarge Table, she has just pills and he has some expensive stuff. It looks more like a business meeting. Still, that scene had me allmost feel sorry for Gendo. Acohol + Gendo's Brain + Rei's puppy stare = Yui's puppy stare. And then, he blinks, and it's just Rei again with her blue hair and stuff....

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Thu Aug 05, 2010 4:05 am I like how Gendo gets a proper wine glass, a plate, silverware and a bowl for bread... while Rei is provided a cafeteria lunch tray, a lunchbox and a 'NERV water-in-a-bag' with what appears to be one of those plastic cups you get on aeroplanes XD

[]:             Quote Post by carla » Thu Aug 05, 2010 10:26 am i hadn't noticed that! *wins least-observant-person-on-the-planet award* it's hilarious.

[]:             Quote Post by Lonecow12 » Thu Aug 05, 2010 12:20 pm Poor Rei. I guess it's good she never got to make dinner:

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Thu Aug 05, 2010 12:31 pm Shinji in that picture reminds me of Monkey D. Luffy. And that is terrifying .

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Aug 05, 2010 12:45 pm You know, I just got an idea. If those pills are to keep her alive, it sort of implies she can't digest normal food... Did Shinji seal Rei's fate in this continuity by feeding her miso soup? "OMG wtf's happening to Ayanami?" "Shit, she can't digest complex sugars! WTF did you do, Shinji?" "...Shinji-kun...i-it hurts...*flatline.* Cue Trollface Ritsuko destroying the clones.

[]: Re: "Some Meal Rei Gets to Eat"- *Sarcasm*             Quote Post by JoeD80 » Thu Aug 05, 2010 1:23 pm Ornette wrote: I think the writers expect people to see the contrast. Steak is kind of extravagant in Japan, there aren't chain steakhouses there that serve $5 steaks like they have in the states.

[]:             Quote Post by The Abhorrent » Thu Aug 05, 2010 1:46 pm Sort of pointing out the obvious here, but isn't Rei a vegetarian? Something touched upon in the original series, but never really explained (speculated maybe). So that just raises the question of why Gendo is eating steak? And while we're there, why does Rei dislike eating meat in the first place? Hmm... intriguing. Maybe I shouldn't be looking (haven't seen 2.0 yet, spoiling it all for myself), but is Rei really eating nothing but pills? I can conceive diced vegetables looking vaguely like that (yet it's lacking utensils... so I could easily be wrong), though there definititely is a strong resemblance to pills in the first image. Is there a better shot of her "meal" somewhere out there? Even taking that into account, it still doesn't explain the stark contrast of how each of them is eating their meals. High-class vs. school lunch or maybe even hospital food... it's just not cricket.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Thu Aug 05, 2010 2:12 pm Well, Perhaps Rei just doesn't like the taste/consistence of meat instead of being a vegetarian because of "Uuuuh, the poor little animals!", and therefore has no problem with others eating meat. She has a fridge in her appartment and I think she had plastic bag with cans hanging on it, so she must eat some proper food, she wouldn't buy a fridge if she didn't deem it necessary. PS: That fanart is impossibly cute, even if there's somethig scary about the laughing Ikaris. They're not suposed to do that *shudder*

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Aug 05, 2010 2:17 pm Kendrix wrote: there's somethig scary about the laughing Ikaris. They're not suposed to do that *shudder*

[]:             Quote Post by KLVTZ » Thu Aug 05, 2010 2:26 pm The Abhorrent wrote: Sort of pointing out the obvious here, but isn't Rei a vegetarian? Something touched upon in the original series, but never really explained (speculated maybe). So that just raises the question of why Gendo is eating steak? And while we're there, why does Rei dislike eating meat in the first place? Hmm... intriguing. Maybe I shouldn't be looking (haven't seen 2.0 yet, spoiling it all for myself), but is Rei really eating nothing but pills? I can conceive diced vegetables looking vaguely like that (yet it's lacking utensils... so I could easily be wrong), though there definititely is a strong resemblance to pills in the first image. Is there a better shot of her "meal" somewhere out there? Even taking that into account, it still doesn't explain the stark contrast of how each of them is eating their meals. High-class vs. school lunch or maybe even hospital food... it's just not cricket.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Thu Aug 05, 2010 2:27 pm Baaad, baaad Rei. I just hope that the aphrodisiacum didn't end up in the wrong bowl. *tries to get disturbing Picture out of her head*

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Thu Aug 05, 2010 2:49 pm The Abhorrent wrote: And while we're there, why does Rei dislike eating meat in the first place?

[]: Re: "Some Meal Rei Gets to Eat"- *Sarcasm*             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Aug 05, 2010 3:30 pm JoeD80 wrote: Japan does have a chain steakhouse. "America's #1 steakhouse: Outback Steakhouse." (So says the banner in front of one in Tokyo).

[]:             Quote Post by Voland » Thu Aug 05, 2010 3:35 pm I personally think Rei does eat "normal" food, but rarely. If she never had a non pill based lunch, then Shinji offering her a lunchbox should´ve been rejected. Next scene, we see an empty lunchbox. Or maybe in the future humans can survive off supercondensed nutritional pills
